p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 pass_to_pass tests with origin: repo_tests. CI commands found from .github/workflows/test.yaml and check.yaml: 1) pnpm --filter @remix-run/fetch-router test - runs Node.js native test runner on the package (test_repo_unit_tests), 2) pnpm lint -- packages/fetch-router/src - runs ESLint on modified source (test_repo_lint), 3) pnpm --filter @remix-run/fetch-router typecheck - runs tsgo TypeScript compiler (test_repo_typecheck). Docker image built successfully. All 7 p2p tests pass (4 static + 3 repo_tests). 5 f2p tests fail as expected on base commit.

rubric_enrichment.rejection_reasons: 2 about changes/releases (process rules), 1 about demo ports (not applicable), 1 about accessible navigation (not applicable to this PR)

validate.notes: All validation checks passed: Docker build succeeded, NOP test correctly returns reward=0 (5 f2p tests fail on base code, 7 p2p tests pass), Gold test returns reward=1 (all 12 tests pass). Updated rubric rule to be applicable for deletion PR: changed from code style rules (imports/test callbacks) to 'When removing an unreleased breaking change feature, the corresponding change file must be deleted'. The gold solution correctly follows this rule as verified by test_change_file_deleted passing and container inspection showing minor.router-run.md is deleted.
